sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_date DateTime, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, toStartOfMonth(event_date) AS start_of_month FROM test_dates WHERE event_date != ANY (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates WHERE description = 'Event A' AND event_date IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM test_dates GROUP BY toStartOfMonth(event_date) HAVING event_count != ANY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates GROUP BY description);
CREATE TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT toStartOfMonth(event_date) AS rounded_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;

SELECT rounded_date FROM temp_dates WHERE rounded_date <= (SELECT toStartOfMonth(MAX(event_date)) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL) AND rounded_date != ANY (SELECT toStartOfMonth(toDateTime(NULL)) FROM temp_dates);
SELECT id, SUM(CASE WHEN event_date IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS non_null_events FROM test_dates GROUP BY id HAVING non_null_events != ANY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NULL);
SELECT DISTINCT id, toStartOfMonth(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date != ANY (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE another_dates (value DateTime64(3)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
SELECT value, toStartOfMonth(value) AS month_start FROM another_dates WHERE value != ANY (SELECT toDateTime64('2023-01-01 00:00:00.000', 3) FROM another_dates);
